tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Protos
tasting_rooms.address: C/ Bodegas Protos, 24-28, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided tour with tasting from EUR 12; premium flights available
tasting_rooms.description: Ribera del Duero cooperative founded 1927, now housed in a landmark Richard Rogers building beside Penafiel Castle. Tour spans the 14th-century underground cellars and the modern above-ground winery; flights include 2-3 DO Ribera del Duero wines.

tasting_rooms.name: Pago de Carraovejas
tasting_rooms.address: Camino de Carraovejas s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: 6 Senses visit approx EUR 80; 6 Senses with tasting menu approx EUR 150
tasting_rooms.description: Estate tasting programme launched in 2013. Guided visits explore vineyard, cellar and barrel room with panoramic views of the Duero valley. Tasting accompanied by a gastronomic proposal from the Ambivium team. One of Ribera del Duero's most in-demand estate experiences.

verified.address_quoted: Camino de Carraovejas, s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Espana

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Emilio Moro
tasting_rooms.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria s/n, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Wine Speaks to You from EUR 25; Taste our Ribera from EUR 40; gastronomic experience from EUR 80
tasting_rooms.description: Family estate on the Golden Mile offering three tasting formats from vineyard walk plus three wines to a full gastronomy experience with roast suckling lamb. Glass-enclosed wine bar terrace overlooks the estate vines.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria, S/N, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Legaris
tasting_rooms.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Classic 90-min tour and 3-wine tasting EUR 28; barrel experience EUR 35
tasting_rooms.description: Codorniu Group winery surrounded by vineyards and medieval castles. Classic guided tour covers winemaking facilities and estate vineyards; barrel tasting workshop available for deeper exploration of blending.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva, Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Comenge
tasting_rooms.address: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47346 Curiel del Duero, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided visit and tasting from EUR 20; picnic in vineyard garden available on request
tasting_rooms.description: Organic-viticulture winery founded 1999 by Jaime Comenge Puig at the foot of Curiel de Duero castle. Panoramic restaurant and garden host tastings; Saturday morning slots are popular for groups discovering the organic estate program.

verified.address_quoted: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47346 Curiel del Duero, Spain

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Arzuaga Navarro
tasting_rooms.address: Carretera N-122, Km 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Classic cellar tour and 3-wine tasting from EUR 25; wine bar walk-in pours from EUR 5
tasting_rooms.description: Golden Mile estate with hotel, spa, restaurant and wine bar under one roof. Tasting room open to walk-ins for by-the-glass pours from the Arzuaga DO Ribera del Duero range; guided cellar tours include vintage vertical flights on request.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera N-122, 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid

tasting_rooms.name: Finca Villacreces
tasting_rooms.address: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Villacreces Tour from EUR 30; e-bike vineyard tour from EUR 45
tasting_rooms.description: 115-hectare estate in organic viticulture since 2017, bordered by Vega Sicilia and bicentennial pine forest. Guided visit covers winery and vineyards; distinctive e-bike tour of the 4.5 km estate loop available.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Espana

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Felix Callejo
tasting_rooms.address: Avenida del Cid, Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Visit and 4-wine tasting EUR 33; private family-led experience EUR 55
tasting_rooms.description: Family estate in Sotillo de la Ribera specialising in single-vineyard Tempranillo from old vines. Tastings led by the Callejo family; programme covers fermentation hall, barrel cellar and bottling line with estate-grown appetisers.

verified.address_quoted: Avenida del Cid, Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Espana

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Nabal
tasting_rooms.address: A1 Highway exit 168, Valle de Nabal, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: 60-min tour and tasting from EUR 18; extended wine bar pours by the glass
tasting_rooms.description: Family winery founded by the Navarro Balbas family in Gumiel de Izan, sourcing grapes from near-century-old vines. Covered porch overlooks the valley; cosy wine bar open after guided tours for further by-the-glass exploration.

verified.address_quoted: A1 Highway exit 168, Valle de Nabal, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos

tasting_rooms.name: Velvety Wines - Dominio Lubiano
tasting_rooms.address: Ctr Pesquera-Valbuena Polig 9 Parc 66, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Winery tour and 3 tastings with tapa from EUR 20; Golden Mile viewpoint experience EUR 30
tasting_rooms.description: Small family winery on the Golden Mile with avant-garde glass-and-concrete architecture. Co-owner and winemaker Monica leads informal tours with panoramic viewpoint tasting overlooking the 12th-century Valbuena monastery.

verified.address_quoted: CTR PESQUERA - VALBUENA POLG 9 PARC.66, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

tasting_rooms.name: Alejandro Fernandez - Tinto Pesquera
tasting_rooms.address: C/ Real 2, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided visit and 3-wine tasting from EUR 22; minimum 7 persons or equivalent
tasting_rooms.description: Founded 1972 by Alejandro Fernandez, one of Ribera del Duero's pioneering modern estates. Tour covers the 16th-century press where original vintages were made, the modern cellar and barrel room; tasting features wines from the Familia Fernandez Rivera range.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Real, 2, Pesquera de Duero 47315 Valladolid

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Portia
tasting_rooms.address: Antigua Carretera Nacional 1 Km. 170, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided visit and 2-wine tasting EUR 12; premium tasting options available
tasting_rooms.description: Faustino Group winery in a Norman Foster-designed three-armed star building (2010). Tour visits both the production and ageing areas; the central Agora area houses a wine bar with tapas, gourmet shop and auditorium with vineyard views.

tasting_rooms.name: Bodega Emina Ribera
tasting_rooms.address: Ctra. San Bernardo s/n, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Origen Matarromera experience from EUR 25; premium vertical tasting EUR 45
tasting_rooms.description: Matarromera Group winery in Valbuena de Duero presenting wine as art and culture. Semi-buried barrel park with Duero valley views; guided tour includes the winemaking hall and underground cellar finishes with structured tasting of Emina and Matarromera labels.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. San Bernardo, s/n. Valbuena de Duero

tasting_rooms.name: Bodega Historica Don Carlos s. XV
tasting_rooms.address: C/ Isilla s/n, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Underground cellar tour and 6-wine tasting from EUR 18
tasting_rooms.description: 15th-century underground bodega in the historic labyrinth below Aranda de Duero. Guided descent through stone-carved corridors leads to a curated tasting of six wines from small Ribera del Duero producers. Also home to the Ribiertete escape-room experience.

verified.address_quoted: C. Isilla, Aranda de Duero, Burgos

tasting_rooms.name: Abadia Retuerta LeDomaine Cellar Visits
tasting_rooms.address: Monasterio de Santa Maria, 122 Km. 332.5, 47340 Sardon de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Estate cellar visit and tasting from EUR 35; Connoisseur experience from EUR 75
tasting_rooms.description: 12th-century Augustinian abbey winery producing pago-classified wines outside the DO Ribera del Duero. Cellar visits explore the original abbey architecture, underground barrel hall and library of experimental barrel vinifications; tasting showcases Petit Verdot, Seleccion Especial and single-pago wines.
